title: Master bullet bank
description: The full long-form history grounding LLM tailoring: every accomplishment as a bullet with a stable id. Richer than any rendered resume — includes content too verbose to render. The tailoring verify pass traces every overlay patch back to bullets here (audit.claims[].groundedIn = ['master:<id>']). Enriched during the Phase 3 interview.

updatedAt.description: ISO date of last content edit

id.description: Stable kebab-case id, never renamed once referenced by an audit

source.description: JSON Pointer into resume.json when the bullet mirrors rendered content; omitted for bank-only bullets

context.description: Org / project / role the bullet belongs to

metrics.description: Quantified claims contained in the bullet, extracted verbatim
